s-1.ptxt: PRECAUTION

atten2.ptxt: Be sure to read "PRECAUTION" thoroughly before servicing (See page ).

s-1.ptxt: DISCONNECT CABLE FROM NEGATIVE BATTERY TERMINAL

atten2.ptxt: Wait for 90 seconds after disconnecting the cable to prevent airbag deployment.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE SHIFT LEVER KNOB SUB-ASSEMBLY (for Automatic Transaxle)

s2.ptxt: Turn the shift lever knob counterclockwise and remove the shift lever knob sub-assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE SHIFT LEVER KNOB SUB-ASSEMBLY (for Manual Transaxle)

s2.ptxt: Turn the shift lever knob counterclockwise and remove the shift lever knob sub-assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE NO. 1 INSTRUMENT CLUSTER FINISH PANEL GARNISH

s2.ptxt: Disengage the 2 clips and remove the No. 1 instrument cluster finish panel garnish.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE NO. 2 INSTRUMENT CLUSTER FINISH PANEL GARNISH

s2.ptxt: Disengage the 2 clips and remove the No. 2 instrument cluster finish panel garnish.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FLOOR SHIFT POSITION INDICATOR HOUSING SUB-ASSEMBLY (for Automatic Transaxle)

s2.ptxt: Disengage the 6 claws and the 3 clips, and then remove the floor shift position indicator housing sub-assembly.
with Seat Heater System:

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE UPPER CONSOLE PANEL (for Manual Transaxle)

s2.ptxt: Open the lid of the upper console panel.
Apply protective tape to the area shown in the illustration.
Using a moulding remover, disengage the 2 claws and the 5 clips, and then remove the upper console panel as shown in the illustration.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE UPPER CONSOLE REAR PANEL SUB-ASSEMBLY (for Automatic Transaxle)

s2.ptxt: Disengage the 3 claws and the 5 clips.
Disconnect the connector and remove the upper console rear panel sub-assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE UPPER CONSOLE REAR PANEL SUB-ASSEMBLY (for Manual Transaxle)

s2.ptxt: Disengage the 3 claws and the 5 clips.
Disconnect the connector and remove the upper console rear panel sub-assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE UPPER CONSOLE PANEL SUB-ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Remove the 2 screws <F>.
Disengage the 4 claws.
Disconnect each connector and remove the upper console panel sub-assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT DOOR SCUFF PLATE LH

s2.ptxt: Disengage the 7 claws and 3 clips, and remove the front door scuff plate LH.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE COWL SIDE TRIM SUB-ASSEMBLY LH

s2.ptxt: Remove the cowl side trim clip.
Disengage the 2 clips and remove the cowl side trim sub-assembly LH.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE LOWER INSTRUMENT PANEL FINISH PANEL LH

s2.ptxt: Remove the bolt <A> and the screw <B>.
Disconnect the hood lock control cable assembly.
Disengage the claw and the 9 clips.
Remove the air hose, disconnect the connector, and then remove the lower instrument panel finish panel LH.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT DOOR SCUFF PLATE RH

atten4.ptxt: Use the same procedure for the RH side and the LH side.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE COWL SIDE TRIM SUB-ASSEMBLY RH

atten4.ptxt: Use the same procedure for the RH side and the LH side.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE INSTRUMENT PANEL NO. 2 UNDER COVER SUB-ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Disengage the 4 claws.
Disengage the 2 guides and remove the No. 2 under cover sub-assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE LOWER INSTRUMENT PANEL SUB-ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Remove the bolt <A>.
Remove the 4 screws <B>.
Disengage the 3 claws and the 3 clips.
Disconnect the connector and remove the lower instrument panel sub-assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE CONSOLE BOX POCKET

s2.ptxt: Remove the console box pocket.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE CONSOLE BOX CARPET

s2.ptxt: Remove the console box carpet.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE CONSOLE BOX ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Remove the 2 screws <F>.
Disengage the clamp.
Remove the 2 bolts <G> and the console box assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE NO. 1 CONSOLE BOX INSERT FRONT

s2.ptxt: Remove the 3 screws <F>.
Disengage the clip and remove the No. 1 console box insert front.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE NO. 2 CONSOLE BOX INSERT FRONT

s2.ptxt: Remove the 3 screws <F>.
Disengage the clip and remove the No. 2 console box insert front.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE NO. 1 CONSOLE BOX DUCT (for Automatic Air Conditioning System)

s2.ptxt: Remove the clip and No. 1 console box duct .

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE CENTER AIRBAG SENSOR ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Turn back the carpet.
Disconnect the holder (with connectors).
Remove the 3 bolts and center airbag sensor assembly.
